title: colona angusta
intro: Colona angusta, also known as the Australian coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Colona angusta include wound healing, skin conditions, and relief from fever. Colona angusta can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including teas and poultices.
